turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Can you tell me a little about yourself and how long you and your partner have been together?

turns.speaker: partner
turns.text: We've been together for four years, living together for two. I'm Alex. Things have been really good overall but lately I feel like we're drifting a bit.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: What brought you to seek support at this time?

turns.speaker: partner
turns.text: We've been arguing more. Small things mostly but they're adding up. I want to get ahead of it before it becomes something bigger.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: How would you describe the strengths of your relationship?

turns.speaker: partner
turns.text: We're really good at making each other laugh. We have the same values about the important things — family, honesty. When things are good, they're genuinely great.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Can you describe a recent conflict that felt significant?

turns.speaker: partner
turns.text: Jordan went quiet for a whole evening after I brought up us not spending enough time together. Instead of talking it turned into this cold silence that lasted days. It made me feel completely shut out.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: What are your hopes for this process?

turns.speaker: partner
turns.text: I want us to learn to actually talk when something's wrong instead of retreating. I love Jordan. I just want us to feel close again.
